weaknesses.issue: The overall ECoG decoder loss function is described in prose but not formalized with an equation, unlike the synthesizer equations. The auto-encoder Praat supervision loss weights (beta values) are missing.
weaknesses.fix: Add the formal loss equation for the ECoG decoder and include the Praat supervision beta weights from the experimental log.

weaknesses.issue: This subsection is purely prose without concrete sample size reminders or structured comparisons. The 48% statistic appears only once and would benefit from integration with the architecture results.
weaknesses.fix: Add explicit n values and clarify the 48% PCC range statistic with its context.

weaknesses.issue: The word-level cross-validation paragraph is brief and does not mention the specific fold structure (5 folds with 10 held-out unique words) already detailed in Methods. The 80/20 training/testing split is also not explicitly restated.
weaknesses.fix: Strengthen the word-level CV paragraph with fold-specific detail and clarify training/testing proportions.

weaknesses.issue: The noise-level estimation procedure for significance assessment is not described -- the experimental log mentions training shuffled models to derive noise baselines.
weaknesses.fix: Add the shuffled-model noise baseline procedure to the contribution analysis subsection.
